compiled_state.title: debug-everything: no build step -> build failures not caught during debug sessions
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Reported by user during interactive session. The /dso:debug-everything workflow diagnoses and fixes bugs but does not run a build step (e.g., compile, package build) to verify the build process succeeds after fixes. This means build failures introduced by changes can be missed during debug sessions. A build verification step should be added to the workflow, either as part of the validation loop or as a separate post-fix gate.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — skill guidance gap in debug-everything SKILL.md. Gate 1a: skipped (CLI_user tag). Dispatching bot-psychologist for investigation.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix implemented: Added CMD_BUILD to validate.sh (reads from commands.build config key, defaults empty/disabled). Added conditional LAUNCHED_CHECKS update and run_check call. Added commented-out commands.build example to dso-config.conf. RED test test-validate-build-step.sh (4 tests) passes GREEN. Closing.
comments.author: Test
